/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/config_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/sparqy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/sparqy_compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/sparqy_slim_export.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparqy.dir/src/sparqy_statistics.cpp.o -o sparqy  /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
